articles.original_title: “Before you marry her, watch her mother closely, that’s the first classroom your wife attended” - LADY sparks reactions with bold marriage advice

A2.title: Marriage Advice
A2.body: A woman gives marriage advice. She says men must watch their wife's mother. This is because mothers teach women. The woman says this is not true for all women. She wants men to be careful. Marriage is not easy.

B1.title: Marriage Advice Goes Viral
B1.body: A woman's marriage advice on social media has caused a big reaction. She said men should watch their girlfriend's mother before marrying. This is because a woman's upbringing can shape her behavior. The woman said people learn relationship habits from their family, not just from anywhere. She also said that marriage is not just about love, but about understanding each other. The woman's advice was shared on Tuesday, May 05, 2026, and many people are talking about it. Her message is to look beyond love before getting married. This advice is important for people to think about before they get married. It can help them understand their partner better.

B2.title: Marriage Advice Goes Viral
B2.body: A woman's bold marriage advice has sparked widespread reactions on social media. On May 5, 2026, she shared a post urging men to observe the mothers of their potential wives, as upbringing significantly influences behavior. She stated that relationship habits are learned early in life, often from one's mother. The woman emphasized that nobody learns marriage overnight and that most women learn from their mothers. However, she acknowledged that this may not apply to everyone, saying some women are different. She cautioned that marriage is not magic, but rather a continuation of what one has learned. Therefore, she advised people to look beyond love before getting married. Her post has generated a lot of discussion, with many people sharing their thoughts on the role of upbringing in shaping marital relationships. The advice has been met with both agreement and disagreement, highlighting the complexity of marriage and relationships.

C1.title: Marriage Advice Sparks Debate
C1.body: A woman's audacious marriage advice has garnered widespread attention on social media, prompting a plethora of reactions. On Tuesday, May 05, 2026, she posited that men should scrutinize the mothers of their prospective wives, as upbringing ostensibly plays a pivotal role in shaping behavior. Her rationale was that relationship habits are often ingrained early in life, and she astutely observed that 'nobody learns marriage in the air.' Instead, she suggested that most women learn from their mothers, which she termed 'the first classroom.' Although she conceded that this axiom may not be universally applicable, she cautioned that marriage is not an ephemeral, magical experience, but rather a continuum. Therefore, she advised individuals to look beyond love before making a long-term commitment. Her words of wisdom have sparked a debate about the significance of familial influences on relationships. The woman's advice has been shared widely, with many people reflecting on the importance of considering a partner's upbringing before marriage. Her message serves as a reminder that relationships are complex and multifaceted, and that careful consideration is essential before making a lifelong commitment.

articles.original_title: Delta Air Lines snack and beverage changes hit short flights under 350 miles across US network

A2.title: Delta Air Changes
A2.body: Delta Air Lines changes snacks and drinks. This is for short flights under 350 miles. Passengers get less food now. Delta does this to save money. It affects US flights.

B1.title: Delta Air Changes Snack Rules
B1.body: Delta Air Lines is making changes to its snack and beverage service on short flights. The new rules apply to flights under 350 miles across the US network. Passengers on these flights will see service cuts. The changes are now in place and affect many routes. Delta made the decision to cut services on short flights. This decision will impact many passengers who fly with Delta. The airline is changing its rules to make flights more efficient. Passengers should check with Delta to see how the changes affect their flight. The new rules are part of Delta's plan to improve its service. Delta wants to make sure passengers have a good experience.

B2.title: Delta Air Cuts Snacks
B2.body: Delta Air Lines has made significant changes to its snack and beverage services on short flights. The new rules apply to flights under 350 miles across the US network. Passengers on these flights should expect service cuts, which may affect their overall travel experience. The changes are likely to impact a large number of travelers, as many domestic flights fall within this distance range. Delta Air Lines has not provided a clear reason for these changes, but it is likely due to cost-cutting measures. The airline industry has been facing financial challenges, and companies are looking for ways to reduce expenses. As a result, passengers may need to adjust their expectations when it comes to in-flight services. The changes may also affect passenger satisfaction and loyalty to the airline. Overall, the new rules are part of a larger trend in the airline industry, with many companies re-evaluating their services to stay competitive.

C1.title: Delta Air Lines Alters Snack Policy
C1.body: Delta Air Lines has implemented a significant overhaul of its snack and beverage offerings on short-haul flights spanning less than 350 miles across its vast US network. This strategic move is poised to impact a substantial number of passengers, who will undoubtedly notice the discernible shift in the airline's service paradigm. The new rules, designed to optimize efficiency and streamline operations, will necessitate a degree of adaptability from travelers accustomed to the previous amenities. As the airline navigates this transitional phase, passengers can expect a more austere service protocol, with a concomitant reduction in the variety of snacks and beverages available. The rationale underlying this decision is likely rooted in the airline's efforts to mitigate costs and enhance its competitive edge in an increasingly saturated market. Consequently, the alterations will have far-reaching implications for the airline industry as a whole, prompting other carriers to reevaluate their own service models. The changes will undoubtedly be scrutinized by travelers and industry experts alike, who will be keenly observing the repercussions of this bold initiative. By streamlining its services, Delta Air Lines aims to bolster its market position and cement its reputation as a premier carrier.

A2.title: Mosaic Art Class

B2.title: Mosaic Art Workshop

The session was an opportunity for individuals to explore their creativity and take a break from their daily routines. Mosaic-making is an art form that requires patience and attention to detail, but the end result can be truly rewarding. The workshop was a great way to unwind and express oneself through art. Anjali's expertise and guidance made the experience enjoyable and informative. The session was a great example of how art can be used as a form of therapy and self-expression, allowing individuals to tap into their creative side and produce something truly unique and meaningful, making it a valuable experience for all involved, every time.

C1.title: Mosaic Art Workshop
C1.body: Under the adept guidance of Anjali Venkat, a seasoned artist with over 25 years of experience, participants will embark on an immersive journey to discover the fundamentals of mosaic-making. This creative endeavor will utilize an array of materials, including glass, tiles, mirrors, and an assortment of found objects, thereby fostering an environment conducive to artistic expression. As a platform for creative escape, the session will not only facilitate the acquisition of a new skill but also serve as a catalyst for self-discovery and personal growth. By exploring the realm of mosaic art, individuals will be able to transcend the mundane and tap into their innate creativity, thereby experiencing a profound sense of fulfillment. The workshop's emphasis on experimentation and innovation will undoubtedly inspire a new wave of artistic enthusiasts. With its rich tapestry of colors, textures, and patterns, the world of mosaic-making awaits, promising an unparalleled adventure of discovery and artistic exploration.

articles.original_title: iPhone 17 Pro Max, Galaxy S26 Ultra, Redmi A5, More: Here Are the Top 10 Best Selling Smartphones in Q1 2026

A2.title: Best Phones Sold
A2.body: New phones are sold. Top ten phones are very popular. They sell 25% of all phones in the first quarter of 2026. This is a new record. Many people buy these phones. They like them. Phones are important now.

B1.title: Best Selling Phones Q1 2026
B1.body: In the first quarter of 2026, the top ten smartphones made up 25% of all global sales. This is the highest percentage ever for a first quarter. Counterpoint reported this information. The top phones were very popular and many people bought them. The sales were high because these phones are good quality and have nice features. People like to buy the best phones they can. The top ten phones included the iPhone, Galaxy, and Redmi. These phones are from different companies but are all very popular. They are sold all around the world and many people use them. The high sales are important for the companies that make the phones.

B2.title: Top Smartphones of Q1 2026
B2.body: According to a recent report by Counterpoint, the top ten smartphones accounted for 25% of all global smartphone sales in the first quarter of 2026. This is the highest percentage ever recorded for a first quarter, indicating a significant shift in consumer preferences. The report highlights the dominance of a few key models, including the iPhone 17 Pro Max and the Galaxy S26 Ultra, in the global smartphone market. The sales figures also reveal the growing competition among smartphone manufacturers, with several brands vying for market share. The report's findings are based on data from the first quarter of 2026, providing valuable insights into the current state of the smartphone industry. The top-selling smartphones are expected to influence the market trends for the rest of the year, making this report a crucial tool for industry analysts and consumers alike. The data also underscores the importance of innovation and marketing in driving sales, as consumers increasingly look for devices with advanced features and sleek designs.

C1.title: Smartphones Dominate Q1 Sales
C1.body: Notably, the inaugural quarter of 2026 witnessed a paradigmatic shift in the smartphone industry, with the top ten bestselling models accounting for a substantial 25% of global sales, as reported by Counterpoint. This unprecedented figure underscores the profound impact of these devices on the market, with the iPhone 17 Pro Max, Galaxy S26 Ultra, and Redmi A5 being amongst the most sought-after models. The erstwhile dominance of these smartphones can be attributed to their cutting-edge technology, sleek designs, and competitive pricing strategies. Furthermore, the fact that this quarter has seen the highest ever sales figures for a first quarter is a testament to the indelible mark these devices have left on the industry. The sales trends observed in Q1 2026 are likely to have far-reaching implications for the industry, with manufacturers continually striving to innovate and improve their offerings. The forthcoming quarters will undoubtedly be shaped by the dynamics of the smartphone market, with consumers eagerly anticipating the next generation of devices. The market share of these top models is a clear indication of their ubiquity and the trust they have garnered amongst consumers. Consequently, manufacturers will need to be adept at navigating this complex landscape to remain competitive.

articles.original_title: The leading theory on prehistoric giant insects is crumbling, and here's what scientists think now - The Times of India

A2.title: Giant Insects Theory
A2.body: Scientists study giant insects. They lived a long time ago. Now scientists think differently. They have new ideas. Scientists are working hard. They want to know more.

B1.title: Giant Insects Theory Fails
B1.body: Scientists are changing their ideas about giant insects from the past. These insects lived a long time ago and were much bigger than today's insects. Researchers thought they knew why they were so big, but now they are not sure. New discoveries are helping scientists learn more about these insects and why they were so large. The old theory is no longer working, and scientists are looking for a new explanation. This is an important discovery because it can help us learn more about the Earth's history and how life on Earth has changed over time. Scientists will keep studying to find the answers.

B2.title: Giant Insects Theory Unravels
B2.body: Scientists have been studying prehistoric giant insects for years, but their leading theory is now crumbling. Recently, researchers have been re-examining the evidence and coming up with new explanations. It appears that the high oxygen levels in the atmosphere during the prehistoric era may not have been the sole reason for the giant size of these insects. Instead, other factors such as the evolution of their body structure and the availability of food may have played a significant role. This new understanding is significant as it changes our perception of the prehistoric world and the creatures that inhabited it. The discovery is also a reminder that scientific theories are not set in stone and can change as new evidence emerges. The study of prehistoric giant insects is an ongoing process, and scientists continue to uncover new information. This new theory is a significant step forward in our understanding of these fascinating creatures and their place in the prehistoric world, shedding new light on a previously misunderstood topic, and highlighting the importance of continued research and discovery.

C1.title: Giant Insects Theory Unravels
C1.body: A paradigmatic shift is underway in the realm of paleoentomology, as the prevailing theory regarding prehistoric giant insects is being dismantled. This erstwhile dominant hypothesis, which attributed the gigantic size of ancient insects to higher oxygen levels in the atmosphere, is being supplanted by novel perspectives. Researchers now posit that other factors, such as the interplay between insect physiology and environmental parameters, may have contributed to the extraordinary dimensions of these ancient creatures. The reevaluation of this theory is being driven by recent discoveries and advancements in the field, which have precipitated a nuanced understanding of the complex relationships between insects, their environments, and the Earth's ecosystem. This seismic shift in our comprehension of prehistoric insects has significant implications for the scientific community, as it underscores the importance of considering multifaceted factors when attempting to reconstruct the past. Furthermore, this development serves as a testament to the dynamic nature of scientific inquiry, wherein theories are continually refined and revised in response to emerging evidence. The ongoing reassessment of this theory is poised to yield a more sophisticated understanding of the history of life on Earth.

articles.original_title: Elon Musk, PM Modi hail GalaxEye’s landmark Mission Drishti space mission

A2.title: India Launches Space Mission
A2.body: India launched a space mission. It has a special satellite. The satellite went to space from California. It is a big deal for India. The mission is important. It helps India.

B1.title: Space Mission Success
B1.body: Elon Musk and PM Modi praised GalaxEye's Mission Drishti. The mission launched from California on a SpaceX Falcon 9. It features the world's first OptoSAR satellite and India's largest private satellite. This is a big step for space technology. The mission is important for India and the world. It shows what can be done with private and public help. The launch was successful and this is a great achievement. The team worked hard to make this happen. The mission will help us learn more about space and its uses. It is a new era for space exploration and India is playing a big role.

B2.title: GalaxEye Launches Historic Space Mission
B2.body: Recently, GalaxEye's Mission Drishti made history with the launch of the world's first OptoSAR satellite. This significant event took place in California, where the satellite was launched aboard SpaceX's Falcon 9. The mission is a major milestone, featuring India's largest privately built satellite. Elon Musk and PM Modi have both praised the achievement, recognizing its importance. The OptoSAR satellite is a notable innovation, offering advanced capabilities. As a privately built satellite, it showcases India's growing space industry. The successful launch is a testament to the collaboration between GalaxEye and SpaceX. This mission marks a new era in space exploration, with potential applications in various fields. The launch has garnered international attention, highlighting India's emerging role in the global space sector. With this achievement, GalaxEye has set a new standard for private space companies, demonstrating its capabilities and expertise.

C1.title: GalaxEye Launches Pioneering Mission
C1.body: In a groundbreaking endeavour, GalaxEye has successfully launched its landmark Mission Drishti, a seminal space mission that has garnered widespread acclaim. The mission, which boasts the world's inaugural OptoSAR satellite and India's largest privately constructed satellite, was launched aboard the SpaceX Falcon 9 from California, underscoring the burgeoning collaboration between Indian innovators and American space agencies. This pioneering feat has been hailed by prominent figures, including Elon Musk and Prime Minister Narendra Modi, who have extolled the virtues of this audacious venture. The OptoSAR satellite, with its cutting-edge technology, is poised to revolutionize the field of space exploration, facilitating unparalleled optical and SAR imaging capabilities. As India continues to assert its presence in the global space arena, Mission Drishti is poised to have far-reaching implications, bolstering the country's reputation as a hub for innovation and technological advancement. The mission's success is a testament to the ingenuity and perseverance of the GalaxEye team, who have worked tirelessly to bring this vision to fruition, and its impact is likely to be felt for years to come, inspiring future generations of space enthusiasts and professionals alike.

articles.original_title: Holmgren has 24 points to help Thunder top Lakers 108-90 in Game 1 of Western Conference semifinals

A2.title: Thunder Beats Lakers
A2.body: Chet Holmgren scored 24 points. He helped the Thunder win. They beat the Lakers 108-90. The game was on Tuesday. It was in Oklahoma City. The Thunder played well.

B1.title: Thunder Beats Lakers
B1.body: The Oklahoma City Thunder played the Los Angeles Lakers on Tuesday night. Chet Holmgren scored 24 points and got 12 rebounds. The Thunder won the game 108-90. This was Game 1 of the Western Conference semifinals. The team played well and Holmgren was a key player. He helped the Thunder win the game. The Lakers did not play as well. The Thunder's win is important for the series. They will play again soon. The team is happy with their win. They hope to win the next game too. The series is just starting and it will be exciting to watch.

B2.title: Thunder Beats Lakers
B2.body: The Oklahoma City Thunder had a convincing win over the Los Angeles Lakers, with a final score of 108-90 in Game 1 of the Western Conference semifinals. Chet Holmgren played a key role, scoring 24 points and grabbing 12 rebounds. This significant victory took place on Tuesday night, showcasing the team's strength and determination. The Thunder's impressive performance was evident as they routed the Lakers, demonstrating their ability to work together seamlessly. With this win, the Thunder has taken the lead in the series, and fans are eagerly awaiting the next game. The team's strategy and skills were on full display, making for an exciting match. As the series progresses, it will be interesting to see how the Lakers respond to this initial loss. The Thunder's success can be attributed to their strong teamwork and effective gameplay, which ultimately led to their victory.

C1.body: In a resounding victory, the Oklahoma City Thunder decisively outmaneuvered the Los Angeles Lakers, securing a 108-90 triumph in Game 1 of the Western Conference semifinals. Chet Holmgren's stellar performance, replete with 24 points and 12 rebounds, was instrumental in the Thunder's success. The team's cohesive strategy and adept execution enabled them to maintain a significant lead throughout the game, ultimately culminating in a convincing win. This victory is pivotal, as it sets the tone for the remainder of the series and underscores the Thunder's potential to make a profound impact in the playoffs. With this win, the Thunder has garnered significant momentum, and their chances of emerging victorious in the series have been substantially enhanced.

articles.original_title: The leading theory on prehistoric giant insects is crumbling, and here's what scientists think now

A2.title: Giant Insects
A2.body: Big insects lived on Earth. They had big wings. Scientists thought oxygen made them big. Now they think other things helped. Insects had small tubes. This changes what we know.

B1.title: Giant Insects Theory Changes
B1.body: Scientists studied giant prehistoric insects with two-foot wingspans. For years, they thought high oxygen levels made them big. But new research shows their breathing tubes were small. This challenges the old idea and opens doors to new theories. Maybe fewer predators or special body limits helped them grow. This discovery changes our understanding of ancient life and how these insects lived. It is an important find and can help us learn more about Earth's past. The new research is exciting and can lead to more discoveries about giant insects and their world.

B2.title: Giant Insects Theory Challenged
B2.body: Scientists have long believed that high oxygen levels in the atmosphere fueled the growth of giant prehistoric insects. These insects, with some having two-foot wingspans, once roamed the Earth. However, new research has revealed that the breathing tubes of these insects were surprisingly small, contradicting the oxygen-only explanation. This discovery has significant implications, as it challenges the leading theory on prehistoric giant insects. The findings open doors to new theories, including the possibility of reduced predation and the limits of exoskeletons. As a result, our understanding of ancient life is being reshaped. The new research provides an opportunity for scientists to explore alternative explanations for the gigantism of these prehistoric insects, ultimately leading to a deeper understanding of the Earth's history and the evolution of life on our planet, sparking further investigation and debate.

C1.title: Giant Insects Theory Challenged
C1.body: The prevailing notion that elevated oxygen levels in the prehistoric era facilitated the existence of gigantic insects, some boasting wingspans of up to two feet, has been cast into doubt by recent findings. Scientists had long adhered to the theory that an oxygen-rich environment was the primary catalyst for this phenomenon of gigantism. Nevertheless, a groundbreaking discovery has revealed that the breathing tubes of these ancient insects were unexpectedly small, thereby undermining the oxygen-only hypothesis. This paradigm-shifting revelation has paved the way for novel theories, including the possibility of diminished predation and the constraints imposed by exoskeletal limitations, ultimately reshaping our comprehension of ancient life forms and their intricacies. The implications of this research are profound, inviting a reevaluation of our understanding of the complex interplay between environmental factors and the evolution of species. As scientists continue to unravel the mysteries of the past, our perception of the prehistoric world is becoming increasingly nuanced, underscoring the dynamic nature of scientific inquiry.

articles.original_title: ‘My brother kicked me in the balls, but I threw a knife at his head. We were in a strange world after our parents died’

A2.title: Brother Fight After Parents Die
A2.body: A man's parents died. He and his brothers were alone. They fought. The man threw a knife. He wrote a book about it. It is a sad story.

B1.title: Brotherly Love Turns Violent
B1.body: Writer Brian Dillon has a new book called Ambivalence. It is about his life after his parents died. He and his brothers were left alone and had to take care of themselves. This was a very difficult time for them. They did not always get along and even fought with each other. Brian's book tells the story of what happened to him and his brothers. It is a story about love, loss, and growing up. The book shows how hard it was for them to live without their parents. Brian's story is very personal and honest. He shares his feelings and experiences with readers. It is a story that many people can relate to.

B2.title: Brotherly Love Turns Violent
B2.body: After their parents' death, writer Brian Dillon and his brothers found themselves in a difficult situation. They had to fend for themselves, leading to a strained relationship. In his new book, Ambivalence, Dillon recounts the shocking aftermath of his parents' passing. The brothers' behavior towards each other became increasingly aggressive, with one incident escalating into physical violence. Dillon's brother kicked him, and in response, he threw a knife. This intense moment highlights the chaos and emotional turmoil they experienced. The book explores the complexities of their relationship and the challenges they faced. Dillon's story is a thought-provoking account of grief, trauma, and the struggle to cope with loss. His experiences raise important questions about family dynamics and the impact of tragedy on relationships. The book offers a unique perspective on the human experience, making it a compelling read. It delves into the emotional struggles of the brothers, providing insight into their lives.

C1.title: Brotherly Love Turns Violent
C1.body: The demise of his parents precipitated a tumultuous period in the life of writer and critic Brian Dillon, as chronicled in his newly released book, Ambivalence. Following the loss of their parental figures, Dillon and his siblings found themselves in a precarious and unfamiliar world, bereft of guidance and support. The aftermath was marked by a disturbing incident in which Dillon's brother kicked him in the groin, prompting a retaliatory response as Dillon hurled a knife in the direction of his brother's head. This shocking episode underscores the sense of desperation and disorientation that pervaded their lives during this trying time. As the siblings struggled to navigate their newfound independence, they were forced to confront the darker aspects of their own relationships and the ambivalence that characterized their feelings towards one another. The book serves as a poignant exploration of the human experience, laying bare the complexities and contradictions that define our most intimate connections. Through his narrative, Dillon sheds light on the resilience and vulnerability that emerge in the face of adversity, rendering Ambivalence a thought-provoking and deeply moving account of familial bonds and personal struggle.
